injuries.comment: The Panthers said on Wednesday (Nov. 19) that Luostarinen is week-to-week after sustaining burns in an accident.
Perbix did not play in Tuesday's (Dec. 2) game versus the Flames.
Barron did not play in Tuesday's (Dec. 2) game against the Flames.
McCarron did not play in Tuesday's (Dec. 2) game against the Flames.
